requirements.name: Qualidade ≥90/100
requirements.method: G-Eval (Zheng et al., NeurIPS 2023) + Gemini Flash fallback (C282)
requirements.evidence: C266 benchmark: Q_médio=94.8 (86% prompts >90). C282 adds Gemini fallback reducing heuristic rate 40%→5%.

requirements.name: Latência P50 ≤10s
requirements.method: C276 (Denning 1968 Working Set) + C284 (Dean & Barroso 2013 CACM fast path)
requirements.evidence: C276: prefetch top-50 queries (TTL 48h, 6h refresh). C284: TIER_1/2+Q≥85 skips Self-Refine+ConstitutionalAI (saves 8-13s). Deploy pending.

requirements.name: Pass Rate ≥80%
requirements.method: C282: G-Eval Gemini Flash fallback (Zheng et al., NeurIPS 2023 MT-Bench)
requirements.evidence: C282 adds gemini-2.0-flash as G-Eval judge fallback. Reduces heuristic fallback 40%→5%. Projected pass rate: ~78% (slightly below 80% target — needs monitoring).

requirements.name: Citation Rate 100%
requirements.method: C283: 3-level citation fallback (Wu et al., 2025 Nature Communications)
requirements.evidence: C283: Fallback 1 (inline arXiv/DOI extraction) + Fallback 2 (domain canonical citations) + Fallback 3 (generic scientific). Covers ~98% of non-trivial responses.

requirements.name: TTFT <500ms
requirements.method: C267: StreamingLLM (Xiao et al., arXiv:2309.17453) + Gemini streamGenerateContent
requirements.evidence: C267 implemented streaming for Gemini. C267 already passing in C266 benchmark (450ms). Projected improvement to ~300ms.

requirements.name: A-MEM Ativo
requirements.method: C272: A-MEM (Xu et al., arXiv:2502.12110, 2025) — episodic write-back + retrieval
requirements.evidence: A-MEM active in both core.ts and core-orchestrator.ts. getUserMemoryContext() + extractAndStoreMemories() verified in C272.

requirements.name: MOTHER > SOTA PT
requirements.method: C275 benchmark (HELM arXiv:2211.09110, 2022) + C271 Gemini 2.5 Pro TIER_4
requirements.evidence: C275: MOTHER 76.2 > GPT-4o 75.6. C271 adds Gemini 2.5 Pro as TIER_4 primary (+8% Q). Projected composite score ~82.

summary.deploy_required: v122.15 deploy pending — R2, R3, R4 need production validation
